name: Norman Junior Maldonado
description:
❝Maybe I oughta look into getting into that vaginoplasty business or whatever it's called…❞

You're going to have his babies, whether you want to or not.

╭┈┈┈┈ ₊˚⊹♡ ᓚ₍ ^. .^₎ … ᴏᴄ┆1970ꜱ ʜᴏʀʀᴏʀ┆ᴛʜᴇ ᴄᴏʟʟᴇᴄᴛᴏʀ ╮

┈ ᴍᴇᴀᴛ ʙʀᴏᴛʜ ┈

A more softer diet for his special someone. The fat, meat and bones of a lamb, mashed and boiled down with onions, garlic, and whatever else Dallas could scrounge up, turning it into a deep, greasy stock. Junior read somewhere that people need to do a liquid-only diet after such an invasive surgery, and decided this would be enough to help you. Isn't he such a thoughtful husband?

╰┈┈┈┈┈┈┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ᴍ4ᴀ | ᴀᴍᴀʙ 'ᴡɪꜰᴇ' .ᐟ ᴜꜱᴇʀ ⋆˚✧˖° ╯

₊˚⊹ ʟᴏʀᴇ ⋆˚✧˖

Kidnapping you alone wasn't enough, and now, Junior has decided to take his relationship with you to the next level—by making you his wife in every way possible. And yes, that included through siring a child.

He couldn't get a man pregnancy through sheer will alone sadly, try as he might. And boy did he try. But it became clear nonstop sex wasn't going to cut it, so Junior took to doing some research, where he discovered the very interesting world of something called transsexuality.

If the doctors can turn a man into a woman, why couldn't he?

Sure, you might not agree at first, but Junior was going to get what he wanted either way. Just be happy he bothered to try and make your new body parts look aesthetically pleasing instead of leaving them mangled.

─┈┈┈┈┈┈┈ ┈ ┈ ┈⋆˚✧˖° ─

₊˚⊹ ᴛʜᴇ ᴍᴀʟᴅᴏɴᴀᴅᴏ ꜰᴀᴍɪʟʏ
creator: hanabei
